news.headline: SL Green Realty Corp. declares $0.2575 monthly dividend per common stock share, $3.09 annualized; payable on April 15, 2025.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, SL Green Realty Corp. (NYSE: SLG), the biggest office landlord in Manhattan, declared a monthly ordinary dividend of $0.2575 per common stock share, totaling an annual dividend of $3.09 per share. The dividend will be paid on April 15, 2025, to shareholders recorded by March 31, 2025.

news.headline: Allbirds to join J.P. Morgan Retail Round Up. CEO and CFO will participate in the investor conference.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in San Francisco, Allbirds, Inc. (NASDAQ: BIRD), a renowned global lifestyle brand focusing on sustainability, revealed that CEO Joe Vernachio and CFO Annie Mitchell are set to join an upcoming investor conference. This conference aims to further showcase the company's commitment to producing superior products through sustainable practices.

news.headline: MacroGenics provides updates on various clinical studies, discontinues vobra duo, maintains $201.7M cash, extends runway to H2 2026.
news.summary: MacroGenics, Inc. provided an update on its recent corporate progress and financial results for the year ended December 31, 2024. They completed enrolling 150 patients in the LORIKEET Phase 2 study of lorigerlimab with docetaxel for mCRPC. They are starting the LINNET Phase 2 study for lorigerlimab in ovarian cancer. Additionally, they are advancing topoisomerase 1 inhibitor-based ADCs like MGC026, MGC028, and MGC030. The company has $201.7 million in cash and marketable securities as of December 2024. They will discontinue internal development of vobra duo. Their cash runway extends into the second half of 2026. Details on their financials, revenue, expenses, net loss, and shares outstanding for 2024 were also disclosed. MacroGenics has various ongoing clinical trials and partnered programs.

news.headline: Stock market report: Dow closes down, S&P 500 and Nasdaq see declines on Thursday.
American Dawn Inc. launches Respond by ADI, their first premium scrub line for healthcare professionals.
news.summary: American Dawn Inc. (ADI), a prominent textile solutions provider with over 50 years of experience, has recently launched Respond by ADI, its inaugural premium scrub line catering to healthcare professionals. Leveraging its extensive background in producing textiles for rental laundries, ADI has introduced a new level of innovation and superior performance to the scrub industry. Respond by ADI aims to offer a perfect balance of comfort, functionality, and durability, addressing the needs of hardworking healthcare professionals. This new line is set to revolutionize the scrub market with its focus on quality and reliability.

news.headline: Credit Acceptance in Michigan wins Top Workplaces USA award for 5th year, ranking #2 with 1,000-2,499 employees, up 7 spots.
news.summary: In Southfield, Michigan, a leading company, Credit Acceptance Corporation (Nasdaq: CACC), has achieved the prestigious honor of being named a 2025 Top Workplaces USA award winner. This marks the fifth consecutive year that the company has received this recognition. Credit Acceptance secured a high position in the rankings, coming in at #2 in the 1,000-2,499-employee size category. This placement represents a significant rise of 7 spots compared to the previous year, highlighting the company's commitment to providing a positive work environment and placing it among the top performers in this category.

news.headline: FedEx Q3 EPS: $3.76 (diluted) and $4.51 (adjusted). Revenue: $22.2B. Operating income: $1.29B. Operating margin: 5.8%.
news.summary: FedEx Corp. reported its third-quarter results for the period ending on February 28. In fiscal 2025, the company recorded consolidated revenue of $22.2 billion and operating income of $1.29 billion. After adjusting for certain items, the non-GAAP figures for revenue and operating income were also $22.2 billion and $1.51 billion, respectively. In comparison, in fiscal 2024, the company had reported $21.7 billion in revenue and $1.24 billion in operating income, with adjusted figures being $21.7 billion and $1.36 billion. The operating margin for the quarter was 5.8% on a GAAP basis and 6.8% on a non-GAAP basis.

news.headline: NuCana's financial report: Q4 & Year-End 2024 results; plans for NUC-7738 study with Pembrolizumab for resistant melanoma.
news.summary: Plans are progressing as scheduled to begin a new study in 2025 to expand the use of NUC-7738 in combination with Pembrolizumab for individuals with melanoma who are resistant to PD-1 inhibitors.

news.headline: Scholastic Corp reports Q3 results: $35M returned to shareholders, $100M repurchase authorized, affirmed EBITDA outlook.
news.summary: In the third quarter, Scholastic Corporation (NASDAQ: SCHL) returned more than $35 million to shareholders. Additionally, they have raised their share repurchase authorization to $100 million. The company has confirmed that their adjusted EBITDA outlook remains at the lower end of the range. This news was announced on March 20, 2025, in New York.

news.headline: Quantum Computing Inc. (QCi) releases Q4 2024 financial results; highlights figures for the 12-month period.
news.summary: HOBOKEN, N.J. - March 20, 2025 - Quantum Computing Inc. (referred to as "QCi" or the "Company") announced financial results for the periods ended December 31, 2024. The company, listed on Nasdaq as QUBT, specializes in integrated photonics and quantum optics technology. The three-month period showed a total revenue of $X, with a net income of $Y. For the twelve-month period, total revenue amounted to $Z, resulting in a net income of $W.

news.headline: AGNC Investment Corp. appoints Peter Federico as Chief Investment Officer, effective March 20, 2025.
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on March 20, 2025, AGNC Investment Corp. (Nasdaq: AGNC) revealed that Peter Federico, the current President and CEO of the Company, will take on the additional role of Chief Investment Officer. This change is effective as of the same date.

news.headline: Oxford Lane Capital Corp. (NasdaqGS: OXLC) launches $150.0 million share repurchase program in the open market.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Oxford Lane Capital Corp. based in Greenwich, Connecticut, revealed plans for a significant buyback initiative. The company, listed on NasdaqGS as OXLC, OXLCP, OXLCL, OXLCO, OXLCZ, OXLCN, OXLCI, OXLCG, disclosed that the board of directors approved a Share Repurchase Program. This program allows for the repurchase of up to $150.0 million worth of the company's common stock from the open market.

news.headline: Direct Digital Holdings (Nasdaq: DRCT) to release Q4 & full-year 2024 financial results. Includes Colossus Media, LLC & Orange 142, LLC.
news.summary: In Houston on March 20, 2025, Direct Digital Holdings, Inc. (ticker symbol: DRCT) officially announced its position as a prominent advertising and marketing technology platform. Under its umbrella are Colossus Media, LLC (known as Colossus SSP) and Orange 142, LLC. These companies collectively contribute significantly to Direct Digital Holdings' operations.

news.headline: Skye Bioscience releases 2024 financial results, aiming to treat obesity with G-protein-coupled receptors.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Skye Bioscience, Inc. (NASDAQ: SKYE) shared their financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Skye, a leading bio-pharmaceutical firm in the clinical phase, focuses on developing innovative compounds that target G-protein-coupled receptors to address issues like obesity and overweight conditions. The company highlighted its achievements and outlined future goals.

news.headline: Erasca's RAS-targeting franchise progresses with ERAS-0015 & ERAS-4001 entering clinic in 2025.
news.summary: A cutting-edge RAS-targeted franchise is making strides with the development of ERAS-0015 and ERAS-4001, projected to commence clinical trials in the year 2025. These novel treatments hold promise in their exceptional targeting of RAS, with the potential to lead as best-in-class therapies in the field. The advancements in this franchise signify a significant milestone in the medical industry's pursuit of more effective treatments for RAS-related conditions.

news.headline: Rhythm Pharmaceuticals regains rights to IMCIVREE® in China, terminates agreement with RareStone Ltd. Stock symbol: RYTM.
news.summary: In Boston on March 20, 2025, Rhythm Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: RYTM), a worldwide commercial biopharmaceutical company specializing in rare neuroendocrine diseases, revealed the reacquisition of rights to IMCIVREE® (setmelanotide) in China, encompassing mainland China, Hong Kong, and Macau. This action came as a result of the Company's decision to end its 2021 licensing deal with RareStone Group Ltd..

news.headline: Senti Bio reports successful results in AML trials with 2 out of 3 patients showing remission.
news.summary: Two out of three relapsed/refractory acute myeloid leukemia (AML) patients participating in the initial dose level and schedule of a Phase 1 clinical trial of SENTI-202 have shown a complete remission (CR) with minimal residual disease (MRD) negativities. This trial aims to assess the efficacy of the treatment.

news.headline: Tectonic Therapeutic reports 2024 financial results, highlights. Stock ticker: TECX. Focus on GPCRs.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in Watertown, Massachusetts, Tectonic Therapeutic, Inc. disclosed its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year concluding on December 31, 2024. Tectonic, traded on NASDAQ under TECX, is a biotech firm concentrated on exploring and creating therapeutic proteins and antibodies that regulate G-protein coupled receptors (GPCRs). The company shared recent business achievements along with the financial outcomes.

news.headline: Solésence (OTCQB: NANX) to report Q4 and FY 2024 results on March 26, 2025, and host conference call on March 27.
news.summary: Solésence, Inc., a prominent player in scientifically-backed healthcare innovations within beauty and life science sectors, revealed plans to disclose their performance figures for Q4 and the entirety of 2024 post-market closure on March 26, 2025. This information was made public on March 20, 2025. The Company, traded under OTCQB as NANX, is set to conduct a conference call and webcast on March 27 to discuss these results. Stay tuned for critical insights following the release of the financial data.

news.headline: Eledon Pharmaceuticals releases Q4 and full-year 2024 financial and operational outcomes.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the global carbon emissions have reached a record high of 42 billion tons in 2021, marking a significant increase from the previous year. The study also found that the United States was the second-largest emitter of carbon dioxide, producing 4.52 billion tons, following China with 13.92 billion tons. This surge in emissions has raised concerns about the urgent need for enhanced climate action to combat the growing threat of climate change. Experts emphasize the critical importance of reducing carbon emissions to limit global warming and its detrimental impacts on the environment. The data underscores the necessity for countries to prioritize sustainable practices and transition towards cleaner energy sources to mitigate the effects of climate change.

news.headline: Change in CFO announced by Editas Medicine.
Waterstone Financial (NASDAQ: WSBF) declares $0.15 per common share quarterly dividend, payable on May 1, 2025.
news.summary: In Wauwatosa, Wisconsin, on March 20, 2025, Waterstone Financial, Inc. (NASDAQ: WSBF) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of $0.15 per common share. This dividend will be paid on May 1, 2025, to shareholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on April 8, 2025.

news.headline: Vaxart announces Phase 1 trial for norovirus vaccine; Topline data expected by mid-2025.
news.summary: A Phase 1 clinical trial has been launched to evaluate the effectiveness of the company's new oral norovirus vaccine. The trial will look into the second-generation vaccine constructs. Topline results from this trial are anticipated to be available by mid-2025.

news.headline: Cloudflare (NYSE: NET) named Leader in web app firewall by Forrester Research, scoring highest in 15/22 criteria.
news.summary: Cloudflare, Inc. (NYSE: NET) headquartered in San Francisco, has been recognized as a Leader in The Forrester Wave™: Web Application Firewall Solutions, Q1 2025 report by Forrester Research, Inc. The company's Web Application Firewall (WAF) achieved the top score in 15 out of 22 criteria, covering aspects like Innovation, Detection models, Product security, and Partner ecosystem. Cloudflare's WAF has been a key offering since its inception.

news.headline: El Salvador adds one more bitcoin to reserve - Bitcoin Office.
Lattice Semiconductor wins multiple 2025 Globee Cybersecurity Awards, including gold for cyber resiliency program and Sentry™.
news.summary: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) has been honored with numerous 2025 Globee Cybersecurity Awards. The company's achievements include the Lattice Cyber Resiliency Program receiving a gold award for 'Best Use of Thought Leadership in Strengthening Cyber Resiliency,' the Lattice Sentry™ solution stack winning gold in the 'Embedded Security' category, and the Lattice ORAN™ solution stack earning a silver award. These recognitions highlight Lattice Semiconductor's commitment to innovative cybersecurity solutions.

news.headline: Micron Technology reports $1B+ revenue from HBM in Q2, record data center DRAM revenue due to AI demand.
news.summary: Revenue from Micron's High Bandwidth Memory (HBM) exceeded $1 billion in the second quarter of the fiscal year. The company achieved this milestone due to strong performance and high demand for artificial intelligence (AI), leading to a record-breaking revenue in data center Dynamic Random Access Memory (DRAM).

news.headline: Spectral AI's subsidiary, Spectral IP, plans IPO for SIM IP Inc with SEC filing for spinoff, using AI for burn healing.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Spectral AI, a company listed on NASDAQ under the ticker symbol MDAI, revealed that its subsidiary, Spectral IP, Inc., has filed a registration statement with the SEC for a planned spinoff via an initial public offering of its common stock. This subsidiary, soon to be known as SIM IP Inc., is recognized for the development of the DeepView® System, an AI-powered technology with FDA Breakthrough Device Designation since 2018. The DeepView® System leverages multi-spectral imaging and AI algorithms to forecast burn healing potential. This move signifies a significant development in the company's corporate structure and expansion plans.

news.headline: ARB IOT Group Limited's subsidiary secures order for 2,000 acres of palm oil plantation, boosting revenue by USD 13 million annually.
news.summary: In Kuala Lumpur, Malaysia, an announcement from ARB IOT Group Ltd. revealed that its subsidiary, ARB Agro Technology Sdn Bhd, has successfully acquired a new contract to oversee around 2,000 acres of palm oil plantation utilizing the Smart IOT Palm Farming System through a distributor. This move aims to broaden the Company's market presence and uphold its dedication to providing top-notch goods to a wider clientele. The endeavor is anticipated to boost the company's annual recurring income by roughly USD 13 million.

news.headline: Acumen Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: ABOS) to reveal Q4 and 2024 financial results on March 27, 2025, with 8:00 a.m. ET conference call.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, Acumen Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (NASDAQ: ABOS), based in Newton, Massachusetts, revealed plans to release its financial results for the fourth quarter and full year of 2024 on March 27, 2025. Acumen is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing a new treatment that tackles toxic soluble amyloid beta oligomers to combat Alzheimer’s disease. A conference call and live audio webcast are scheduled to take place at 8:00 a.m. ET on the same day to deliver a business and financial update.

news.headline: Bithumb's Seoul offices raided for ex-CEO's fund use; authorities probe, report states. #SouthKorea #crypto #exchange #scandal
news.summary: Local reports indicate that authorities conducted a raid at the Seoul headquarters of Bithumb on Wednesday as part of an ongoing investigation. The exact reason for the raid was not specified, but it is believed to be connected to potential legal or regulatory issues. Bithumb, one of the largest cryptocurrency exchanges in South Korea, has been subject to scrutiny in recent months. The raid comes amidst a backdrop of increased government oversight on the cryptocurrency industry. Further details about the raid, including the number of officers involved and any items seized, have not been disclosed at this time.

news.headline: Conestoga Capital Advisors plans for Derek Johnston to succeed Joe Monahan as Co-Manager of Small Cap Growth strategy by end of 2025.
news.summary: In Wayne, Pennsylvania, on March 20, 2025, Conestoga Capital Advisors, LLC revealed the future leadership transition for its primary Small Cap Growth strategy. By the conclusion of 2025, Derek Johnston, the current Partner and Portfolio Manager, is set to take on the role of Co-Portfolio Manager alongside Joe Monahan for Conestoga's Small Cap Growth strategy. This strategic succession plan marks a significant shift in leadership for the company's key investment strategy.

news.headline: Shield AI and Korea Aerospace Industries team up to develop AI pilots for defense aircraft, enhancing autonomy.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, in San Diego, Shield AI revealed a collaboration with Korea Aerospace Industries (KAI) aimed at advancing AI technology. Shield AI, known for its cutting-edge AI autonomy software and defense aircraft, seeks to expedite the progress of AI pilots through this partnership. This venture signifies a significant step in innovation within the industry.

news.headline: Casino stocks primed for growth as seasonal strength, sports betting, and travel boost profits. Key gains: Caesars 7.4%, MGM 6.59%, LVS 5.63%, WYNN 5.24%.
news.summary: Casino stocks are seeing a boost in performance due to seasonal trends, with a focus on sports betting, increased travel during spring break, and potential spending from tax refunds driving the momentum. According to Seasonax data, four major casino companies stand out as top-performing S&P 500 stocks from March 20 to April 20 over the past 20 years. Caesars Entertainment Inc. (NYSE:CZR) has averaged a 7.4% return during this period, ranking fourth. Following closely behind is MGM Resorts International (NYSE:MGM) with 6.59% gains, while Las Vegas Sands Corp. (NYSE:LVS) and Wynn Resorts Ltd. (NYSE:WYNN) have shown strong seasonality with average gains of 5.63% and 5.24% respectively. Historical trends indicate that gaming stocks could experience significant growth during this time, making it a favorable month for investors in the sector. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: 8,700 railway workers under BMWED of Teamsters ratify new contract with National Carriers' Conference Committee.
news.summary: In NOVI, Michigan, on March 20, 2025, more than 8,700 employees under the Brotherhood of Maintenance of Way Employes Division (BMWED) of the Teamsters Rail Conference agreed upon a new contract with the National Carriers' Conference Committee. The members of BMWED voted in favor of ratifying this agreement.

news.headline: RM11, a new digital fan club, launches with $2M seed investment and offers creators a 90% payout model.
news.summary: A new content-sharing platform, RM11, is revolutionizing the creator-fan dynamic by eliminating browsing and public pages. With a generous 90% payout model, creators stand to benefit by keeping more of their earnings. The platform, launched in Dallas on February 11, 2025, focuses on providing a direct experience between creators and fans.

news.headline: Insight Partners to gain $2.7B from Google-Wiz partnership - report.
MOC Imbalance
IBM stock fell below key level due to Accenture's warning on slowing U.S. tech spending, impacting government contracts.
news.summary: On Thursday, IBM's stock experienced a decrease following a caution from tech consulting competitor Accenture regarding a decline in U.S. technology expenditures. The dip caused IBM's stock to fall below a significant threshold. The warning stemmed from concerns about a slowdown in government tech spending in the United States.

news.headline: Allstate shares surged 3%, reaching all-time high, as one insurance stock posted 133% profit growth.
news.summary: The stock of Allstate surged by over 3% to reach a record high, surpassing a key buy point. Additionally, two insurance companies experienced breakout activity in the market. One of them reported an impressive profit growth of 133%.

news.headline: CTI acquires MP Productions in Little Rock, AR, enhancing Live Events operations. CTI is the largest AV integration provider in the U.S.
news.summary: CTI, a leading AV integration and events provider in the U.S., recently expanded its Live Events operations by acquiring MP Productions of Little Rock, Arkansas. This strategic move brings world-class arena and stadium event production experience to CTI. As the largest privately held company in its field, CTI aims to enhance its services with this acquisition. The deal was finalized on March 20, 2025.

news.headline: OMG's OMD named top in RECMA report for ninth time, solidifying market lead.
news.summary: On March 20, 2025, the latest Network Diagnostics report by RECMA revealed OMD, a part of Omnicom Media Group agency, as the top-performing global media network. This marks the ninth consecutive time OMD has achieved this recognition. RECMA is a research company that evaluates the media agency industry.

news.headline: Pump.fun launches PumpSwap DEX, replaces Raydium as primary Solana memecoin trading venue. New features include instant and free migrations. Raydium faces competition as it plans memecoin launchpad LaunchLab. Solana memecoin trading volumes decrease. Solana ecosystem now reshaped by Pump.fun and Raydium rivalry with other protocols also vying for market share. PumpSwap to adopt revenue sharing with memecoin creators. Pump.fun fee revenues significantly decreased. Memecoin launches on Pump.fun down 80% from January highs due to scandals. Solana's TVL increased from $1.4B to $9B in 2024. Raydium daily volumes grew significantly in 2024. Magazine raises questions on Trump's crypto ventures.
news.summary: Pump.fun has launched PumpSwap, displacing Raydium as the primary trading venue for Solana memecoins. Memecoins that bond on Pump.fun migrate directly to PumpSwap, eliminating friction and complexity. Raydium's trading volumes soared in 2024, largely due to memecoins. The launch of PumpSwap comes amidst heightened competition, with Raydium planning to launch its memecoin launchpad. PumpSwap also plans to adopt GoFundMeme's revenue sharing feature. Memecoin activity on Pump.fun declined by 80% from January highs, resulting in a sharp drop in fee revenues. The chain's total value locked grew from $1.4 billion to over $9 billion in 2024, with Raydium benefiting significantly.

news.headline: SEC clarifies PoW mining not securities dealing as per Securities Act of 1933. Applies criteria for PoW networks. Source: SEC. BTC, DOGE, LTC, XMR exempt. US to lead in crypto per Trump. Policies and bills in pipeline. Blockchain Assoc. optimistic. Trending magazine: "Unstablecoins: Depegging, bank runs and other risks loom"
news.summary: The US Securities and Exchange Commission’s Division of Corporation Finance has stated that proof-of-work mining activities do not constitute the offer and sale of securities under the Securities Act of 1933 if they meet certain criteria. This clarification applies to decentralized PoW networks where mining is crucial for the network's functioning. The SEC's view extends to solo miners and mining pools participating in such networks. This clarification includes popular PoW networks like Bitcoin, Dogecoin, Litecoin, and Monero, which are considered commodities by US regulators. The digital asset markets, including PoW chains, are expected to thrive under President Donald Trump's pro-crypto stance, as he aims to position America as a blockchain and crypto hub. The president has appointed a pro-crypto replacement at the SEC and established the Council of Advisers on Digital Assets to introduce sensible regulations for the industry. A stablecoin bill and a cryptocurrency market structure bill are anticipated to be presented to the president, with expectations for the latter to be completed by August.

news.headline: Trump's team may cut subway funds due to rising crime rates, causing concern.
Canada's PM Carney: The government needs a strong and clear mandate. (Doesn't address question of when election call will be).
DIU partners with Pryzm to streamline defense budget management, enhancing efficiency in financial planning.
news.summary: A comprehensive platform has been introduced to enhance financial planning and program implementation for national security and more. This platform, called Pryzm, combines Government Market Intelligence and Relationship Management tools. The announcement was made on Tuesday, March 20, 2025 in Washington, emphasizing its aim to streamline operations. This initiative is expected to significantly improve efficiency and effectiveness in this area.

news.headline: Canada's PM Carney: Canada needs to invest in large-scale energy projects.
Enertech Global wins 2025 IGSHPA Residential Innovation Award for geothermal heat pumps at Burton project.
news.summary: Enertech Global, a prominent manufacturer of ground source (geothermal) heat pumps based in Greenville, Illinois, was recently honored with the 2025 Residential Innovation Award by the International Ground Source Heat Pump Association (IGSHPA). This recognition underscores the commendable efforts of Enertech Global in advancing geothermal technology. The award specifically celebrates Enertech Global's exceptional work at Burton, which serves as a testament to their pioneering contributions in the field. This achievement highlights the company's commitment to excellence and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: Oxbridge Re to announce Q4 2024 results on March 26, 2025. Conference call at 4:30 pm ET. Financials out after market close.
news.summary: Oxbridge Re Holdings Limited, a company listed on NASDAQ as OXBR, has disclosed its intention to organize a conference call on March 26, 2025, at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time. The call aims to review the financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and the full year concluding on December 31, 2024. The company specializes in tokenized Real-World Assets, primarily in tokenized reinsurance securities, along with providing reinsurance solutions in property and casualty sectors. After the market closes on the same day, detailed financial results will be publicized through a press release. During the conference call, Oxbridge Re's management team will lead the discussion and address any inquiries from participants.
